prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `5a719d11`.
codex_response:
Rule: split the grid into horizontal bands and two side panels using the full zero rows/columns. In each band, take the sparse non-background motif mask from the right panel and redraw it on the left using the right panel’s background color, and symmetrically redraw the left mask on the right using the left background color; if the two backgrounds match, the swapped motif disappears.

I discarded the summary hint because it got the separators and background roles right but missed the key behavior: the motif masks swap sides instead of staying in place and just changing color. That correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5a719d11/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed in `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5a719d11/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5a719d11/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5a719d11/generator.py#L1), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_5a719d11/notes.md#L1). The verifier uses zero frontiers to recover the bands/panels and swaps motif masks directly; the generator matches the family by using the same 16/17-column layouts, 2-row separators, 1-2 zero separator columns, and the official height regimes `2->18`, `3->25`, `4->30` with sparse connected motifs.

Validation passed: `arc2.shared.verify` matched `4/4` official examples, the build produced `1000` examples in [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/task.json), and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 5a719d11` passed `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/5a719d11/previews/preview_03.png).
